name: Birria
recipeIngredient: 1 Kilo (2.2 lbs.) of beef rib in pieces.
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the meat with the garlic and onion in enough water to immerse them.
2. Toast, hollow out and soak the chilies (approximately 5 minutes). Strain the chili liquid into the pot with the meat.
3. Add 3 small laurel leaves, cumin, salt, and pepper. Continue cooking until the meat is well done.
